info.title: Event info
info.instructionsBodyOne: Sirf 20 photos har guest layi allowed ne.
info.instructionsBodyTwo: Har photo naal ik chhoti note vi chhad sakde ho, phir ohnu sanjhi gallery vich bhejo.
info.uploadBody: Tuhade kol photos upload karan layi 24 ghante da window hovega, taan jo tusi apne yaadgar lamhe araam naal sanjhe kar sako.
info.noteBody: Je kujh theek na lagge, app refresh karo ya home screen ton dobara kholo.
info.instructionsBodyThree: Photo download karan layi, tasveer nu lamma press karo ya download button te tap karo.

welcome.landingText: Raat layi tuhadi app, moments nu capture te share karan lai, ik polaroid de naal ik polaroid.
welcome.landingSubText: Polaroid lamhan di ik sanjhi gallery.
welcome.installHint: Wiah wali app nu home screen te rakho, taan experience smooth rahe.
welcome.installDescription: Tuhada browser eh app ithe hi install kar sakda hai.
welcome.iosInstallHint: iPhone te share sheet kholo te Add to Home Screen chuno.
welcome.iosStepOne: Safari vich Share button te tap karo.
welcome.greetingText: Assi tuhanu dekh ke bahut khush haan.
welcome.greetingSubText: Apna naam jodo taan jo tuhadiyan photos tuhade naal juriyan rehan poori shaam.
welcome.noteTwo: Tusi har photo te note vi add kar sakde ho.

instructions.titleLead: Jashan vich dakhil hon ton pehlan
instructions.body: Tusi shaam de douran 20 photos tak share kar sakde ho. Har yaad sab de layi nazar aundi hai, taan jo jashan sanjha te sohna rahe.
instructions.notes: Hun photo lo ya thodi der baad wapas aa ke upload karo.

app.placeholder: Sanjhe yaadgar lamhe jald hi ithhe nazar aunge.
app.linkPrompt: Apna naam welcome message vich jodo taan jo photos tuhade naal link ho jaan.
